data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Amazon optimizes decision-making time by simplifying user choices at checkout.
data.technical_spec: Clear call-to-action buttons and streamlined navigation reducing cognitive load.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Design interface prioritizes important functions with larger targets and accessible proximity.
data.technical_spec: Larger buttons for 'Buy Now', prominent search bar placement.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Design aligns with user expectations by maintaining consistency with standards found in ecommerce applications.
data.technical_spec: Consistent layout structure and familiar iconography.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Group related items to imply relationship and improve user comprehension.
data.technical_spec: Product details, add-to-cart options, and pricing information grouped together.

data.title: Aesthetic Usability Effect
data.description: A visually appealing design makes users perceive the system as more usable.
data.technical_spec: Polished interface with a balance of media and text, soothing color palettes.
